title: reseda orientalis
intro: Reseda orientalis, also known as the Oriental Giant Fennel or Oriental Prickly Ash, is a plant species native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Reseda orientalis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate joint pain. Reseda orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
